name: atlas
description: Atlas is a multi-agent coding architect implemented entirely as Claude Code skills. 21 plainly named skills: atlas-orchestrate (the orchestration engine), atlas-audit (code/security audit, architecture mapping, atlas self-telemetry), atlas-setup (onboarding, install, connectors, repair - the one manual skill), atlas-loop (recurring loops), atlas-ux-test (UX test swarm), plus 16 task skills (atlas-feature, atlas-debug, atlas-refactor, atlas-validate, atlas-launch, atlas-harden, etc.). 12 core agents and 10 hooks including dispatch tripwire, completion gate, memory capture, and auto-skill creation. The atlas-orchestrate method demands independent verification with runtime evidence before any done claim. Org deployment (11 departments) lives in the separate armada plugin. Integrates claude-mem and context-mode.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent coding architect with 21 plainly named skills, 12 agents, and observability-driven self-improvement.
